support.name: Strength: Upper Body A (Push/Pull Hypertrophy)
support.description:
Phase 1 - Hypertrophy & Structural Base

A1 Weighted Pull-ups 4x5-6 / A2 Weighted Dips 4x8-10 (60s rest)
B1 DB Incline Press 3x10 / B2 DB Bent-Over Row 3x10 (60s rest)
Finisher: Unweighted pull-up AMRAP x1 (log it)

support.name: Strength: Lower Body Power (Squat/Hex Deadlift/Jumps)
support.description:
Phase 1 - Hypertrophy & Structural Base

A1 Barbell Back Squat 5x5 / A2 Depth Jumps 5x5 (90-120s rest)
B1 Hex Bar Deadlift 4x6 / B2 Bulgarian Split Squat (DB) 3x8/leg (90s rest)
C1 Standing Calf Raise 3x15 (60s rest)

support.name: Strength: Upper Body B (Volume & Physique)
support.description:
Phase 1 - Hypertrophy & Structural Base

A1 Unweighted Pull-ups (volume) 5x8-10 / A2 DB Overhead Press 4x10 (60s rest)
B1 DB Flat Press or Fly 3x12 / B2 EZ Bar Curl 3x12 (60s rest)
Finisher: Dip bar hold or L-sit 3x max

support.name: Strength: Pull-up Specific + Core
support.description:
Phase 1 - Hypertrophy & Structural Base

A1 Weighted Pull-ups 4x4-5 (heavier, lower reps) / A2 Hanging Knee Raise / L-sit progression 4x12 (60s rest)
B1 DB Row (single arm) 3x10/side / B2 Face Pulls or band ext. rotation 3x15 (60s rest)
Finisher: Unweighted pull-up AMRAP x1 (log it)

support.name: Strength: Full Body Power/Physique Finisher
support.description:
Phase 1 - Hypertrophy & Structural Base

A1 Hex Bar Deadlift (light/speed) 4x5 / A2 Box Jump 4x5 (60s rest)
B1 Weighted Dips 3x8 / B2 Bulgarian Split Squat (speed) 3x8/leg (60s rest)
Finisher: DB curl + shoulder finisher superset, 2 rounds

support.name: 🧘 Nightly Mobility (Hips + Back)
support.description:
Nightly mobility routine - hip flexors + thoracic spine rotation. Do this in front of the TV.

1. Child's pose - 90 sec
2. Couch stretch - 90 sec/side (use the couch: back foot up, front leg lunged forward)
3. 90/90 hip switch - 2-3 min, flowing between sides
4. Open-book stretch (side-lying thoracic rotation) - 8-10 reps/side
5. Dead bug - 2x10/side
6. Cat-cow - 10 slow reps
7. Optional: standing figure-4 or seated glute stretch - 60 sec/side

~15-20 min total. Consistency matters more than perfection - even a partial pass most nights beats a perfect routine some nights.
